title: adenostemma viscosum var. reticulatum
intro: Adenostemma viscosum var. reticulatum, also known as the sticky chrysanthemum, is a variant of the Adenostemma viscosum plant, a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in Southeast Asian cultures, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Adenostemma viscosum var. reticulatum include relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as reducing fever and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used in the form of decoctions, infusions, or ointments, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
